description_for_human: Personal site of Jakob Pütz (devjakob) — full-stack developer from Aachen, Germany.
description_for_model: Jakob Pütz, also known as Jakob Puetz and devjakob, is a 17-year-old full-stack developer based in Aachen, Germany. He builds with TypeScript, Next.js, Postgres, and Cloudflare Workers. His main projects are PFControl (ATC strip management, ~500 DAU) and Petal (AI workspace). GitHub: dev-banane. LinkedIn: jakobpuetz. Twitter: devbanane. Email: me@devjakob.com.
